label: Legends & Lore
refreshLabel: Refreshes from the source document about once per hour.
editNote: The lore entries, card list, and lore text are generated from the source document. Update the Google Doc to change this page.

label: Calendar
refreshLabel: Events are pulled live from the group's Google Calendar.
editNote: Add or update events directly in Google Calendar — changes appear here automatically.

label: Chronicles
refreshLabel: Content is served live from the Campaign Brain knowledge base.
editNote: Update content directly in Campaign Brain at kb.suwaneegamers.net.

label: Organizations
refreshLabel: Synced from the campaign setting Google Doc by the scheduled lore sync.
editNote: Update organizations in the campaign setting doc — run the lore sync to apply changes.

label: Territories
refreshLabel: Synced from the campaign setting Google Doc by the scheduled lore sync.
editNote: Update territories in the campaign setting doc — run the lore sync to apply changes.

label: History
refreshLabel: Content is managed from an external source.
editNote: Update the source document to change this page.

label: Maps of Myrdae
refreshLabel: The interactive map is served live from the Myrdae map editor.
editNote: Update the map directly in the Myrdae map editor at mapeditor.suwaneegamers.net.

label: Campaign Setting
refreshLabel: Content is managed from an external source.
editNote: Update the source document to change this page.

label: Crit Tables
refreshLabel: Content is managed from the Crit Tables Google Doc.
editNote: Update the Critical Success, Critical Failure, and Body Hit tables in the source Google Doc, then re-sync to apply changes.
